stemHtml: You plan a flight from Athens to Paris and back. Due to refueling problems in Paris, you decide to take fuel for the flight from Paris to Athens on the outbound leg, so that no fueling is necessary in Paris. What do you expect?

options.a: The fuel consumption will be less from Paris to Athens.
options.b: The take off mass from Paris to Athens increases.
options.c: The CO2 emission will increase on the outbound leg from Athens to Paris.
options.d: The fuel consumption will be less from Athens to Paris.
